description: You are managing the accounting records for GAEC JOULIN, a farm in Charente-Maritime, France. Record an emergency repair expense for a tractor hydraulic pump replacement by Dupont Mécanique as a manual journal entry in Ekylibre. Create a journal entry for 2017-06-15 using the miscellaneous operations journal (Opérations Diverses / OD) or a general-purpose journal. Use the label 'Réparation pompe hydraulique tracteur - Dupont Mécanique' for the entry lines. The entry must consist of a debit of 1250.00 to account 6155 (Entretien et réparations sur biens mobiliers) and a credit of 1250.00 to account 512 (Banque).
